infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: TennCoach uses your photo library so you can upload a profile picture that helps students recognise you, and add marketing photos that showcase your coaching facilities and style.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: TennCoach saves your selected profile photo to your photo library so you can easily reuse it when updating your account.

plugins.savePhotosPermission: TennCoach saves your selected profile photo to your photo library so you can easily reuse it when updating your account.
